dm_text:
Hey, I'm Jackie 🌿 Thanks for commenting.

The banana-peel + baking soda trick is great for surface stains ✨ Rub the inside of a banana peel on your teeth for 2 minutes, then brush with a pinch of baking soda — do this 2-3x a week, not daily (baking soda is abrasive on enamel if overused).

Quick check so I can point you right — is your yellowing more on the surface, or deeper and grey-ish?

Want to tell me more about what you're experiencing? Reply here 👇
public_ack: I've sent you the TCM teeth guide — check your DM! 🌿

dm_text:
Hey, I'm Jackie 🌿 Thanks for commenting.

Quick TCM eye tip: tired, dry, or strained eyes usually trace back to Liver Blood — screens just make it worse. Try this for a week: chrysanthemum + goji berry tea in the afternoon, press the Jingming point (inner corner of each eye, beside the nose) for 30 seconds a side, and do 20-20-20 but add 10 quick blinks at the end to reset your tear film.

I've put together a guide for you — image below, save it!

Do you also wake up between 1 and 3am? That's a Liver Blood signal I'd want to check.

Getting your migraine type right changes everything in TCM. Quick check — which sounds most like you?
1. Throbbing, one side, worse when stressed, better lying down in the dark (Liver Yang Rising)
2. Dull, heavy, worse by end of day, comes with fatigue (Blood Deficiency)
3. Heavy, foggy, nausea, worse in damp weather (Phlegm-Damp)

I've put together a type-comparison guide for you — image below, save it!

Reply with 1, 2, or 3 and I'll send you the right protocol + tea for your type 👇

dm_text:
多謝你留言！🌿 我係芷晴～

蕉皮加梳打粉呢個方法,對表面色斑幾有用㗎 ✨ 用蕉皮內側嗰面搽牙齒兩分鐘,再沾少少梳打粉刷牙,一星期做2-3次就夠,唔好日日做(梳打粉太磨損牙齒琺瑯質)。

想問多啲:你啲牙齒係表面偏黃,定係比較深色、灰灰哋?

dm_text:
Hey, I'm Jackie 🌿 Thanks for commenting.

Morning wood is basically your body's check-engine light for kidney yang 🔥 When that inner fire runs low it shows up everywhere — cold feet, weak lower back, low drive, no stamina.

Start here: walnuts, chives (韭菜), and a warm ginger + cinnamon tea — all eaten warm and cooked. Early nights, and cut the cold drinks that drain the tank.

Quick check so I can point you right — is it more low energy + always cold, or more about drive + stamina?

Tell me more about what you're experiencing 👇
public_ack: Sent you the kidney-yang food guide — check your DM! 🌿

dm_text:
Hey, I'm Jackie 🌿 Thanks for commenting.

Hey! Thanks for commenting — you're in the right place 💪

Here's your quick TCM muscle protocol:
• Build Kidney Essence first: black beans, walnuts, Chinese yam (山藥) daily
• Time your protein: eat within 30 min post-workout WITH warm food — cold shakes block Spleen absorption and slow gains
• Sleep before 11pm: Kidney Essence rebuilds between 11pm–1am. This is when your gains actually happen.

Quick question — which feels more like you: slow recovery (3+ days sore), or training hard but muscles feel 'soft'?
